sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30785" key="e)qelo/suxnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐθελό-συχνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30785.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of repetition, a bore</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48</biblScope> </bibl>(s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
